/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/audio/audio_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/chunker/chunker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/gate/features.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/gate/gate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/asr/asr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/scene/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/scene/adaptive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pipeline.dir/src/logging/logger.cpp.o  -o audio_pipeline  -Wl,-rpath,/home/apr/Personal/cpp-edge-audio/runtime/cpp/build_tests/whisper_build/src:/home/apr/Personal/cpp-edge-audio/runtime/cpp/build_tests/whisper_build/ggml/src whisper_build/src/libwhisper.so.1.8.4 -lm whisper_build/ggml/src/libggml.so.0.9.8 whisper_build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.8 whisper_build/ggml/src/libggml-base.so.0.9.8 -pthread
